title: Independent people column to board members
excerpt:
Sometimes we need to make a relationship between some people in the organization, but we don’t want that person to be a member of the board or be able to see this information. 
This is useful for handling information and…

posts.author: Marifer06 (Marifer MTZM)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sometimes we need to make a relationship between some people in the organization, but we don’t want that person to be a member of the board or be able to see this information.
This is useful for handling information and evaluations etc. and not necessarily to assign tasks to the person.
Using the text column does not allow you to filter the info in a friendly way.
I think that this problem would be solved if there was a column of people of the organization where you can choose several people without them being part of the board. Or that the column’s custom settings of people can be set as task assignments or just information.

posts.author: Allison (Allison Clarke)
posts.cookedHtml: We would definitely find the feature beneficial

posts.author: Raincloud (Anthony Adamson)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like something similar. We use the people column to show which team member is responsible for various tasks but sometimes the task is done by someone we hire that is outside of the company. I don’t want them involved in our project boards in any way, I just want a placeholder in the people column so I can show that ENGINEER or COMPANY X or BOB is currently working on the task.
